html_content.value:
Holiday Shipping Bonus: Get $25 OFF Express or Standard Shipping on orders $300 or more (11/19–12/01) [Terms] Receive $25 OFF Standard or Two-Day Express Shipping with a minimum subtotal of $300 or more. The promotion covers up to $25 of the total shipping fee; any remaining shipping fee balance is the sole responsibility of the customer. The offer code is automatically applied at online checkout. No cash value. Void where prohibited. Subject to the exclusions that follow. Eligibility will be determined at the time of checkout. The offer excludes Next-Day Shipping. The offer also excludes products classified as hazardous materials (e.g., chemicals, compressed gases, etc.) and paints. Certain oversized and heavy items are not eligible, including but not limited to items/packaging exceeding 165" in combined length and width. Items over 50 lbs. will incur a $20 surcharge, and items over 120 lbs. cannot be shipped. Changing and combining orders or changing or entering an invalid shipping address may affect your order’s $25 OFF shipping eligibility.

BMW Motorrad BUY MORE SAVE MORE Holiday Sale - 11/19 - 12/01

Spend $300 - $499.99 and receive $50 Off MSRP - Promo Code: HOLIDAY50

Spend $500 - $999.99 and receive $100 Off MSRP - Promo Code: HOLIDAY100

Spend $1000+ and receive $200 Off MSRP - Promo Code: HOLIDAY200 [Terms] Terms and Conditions:

All items available while supplies last. Prices exclude taxes and / or shipping and handling charges.

Offer valid from 11/19/2025 through 12/01/2025 11:59 PM (EST). Tax and installation not included. Dealer delivery times may vary.

Purchase any eligible BMW Motorrad Riders' or Casual Gear/Clothing, and Original BMW Motorrad Accessories, online at www.shopbmwmotorcycles.com or at an authorized BMW Motorrad Dealership between 11/19/2025 and 12/01/2025 and receive up to $200 OFF MSRP (see discount scale below).

Proof of Purchase Requirements:

• Spend $300 - $499.99 and receive $50 Off MSRP (Promo Code HOLIDAY50)

• Spend $500 - $999.99 and receive $100 Off MSRP (Promo Code HOLIDAY100)

• Spend $1000+ and receive $200 Off MSRP (Promo Code HOLIDAY200)

Enter Promo Code at checkout to determine eligibility. Offers cannot be combined with multiple transactions and/or purchases or combined with any other discount or offer. One offer per household or email address. Offer not valid on previously purchased merchandise. Promo Code offers are not stackable (i.e. multiple coupon codes cannot be applied to a single order). Offer excludes all New Motorcycle Sales, Hard Parts, Chemicals, shipping, tax, services, labor and/or additional dealer charges.

Limited time offer. Offer expires on 12/01/2025 at 11:59pm (EST). Orders submitted after the offer period ends do not qualify.
